-  FFERR_NOTDOWNLOADED 

Global Variable# FFERR_NOTDOWNLOADED

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
var FFERR_NOTDOWNLOADED: Int { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/fferr_notdownloaded#Discussion)

The effect is not downloaded.
